name: hud_ui_zrd_widget_on_activate_queue_exit_current_state
description: HudUiZrdWidget::OnActivateQueueExitCurrentState queues an exit of the current Recoil app state and then runs the normal ZRD widget activation behavior.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification is accepted by the hud_ui_confirm_quit_binary_leaves VC target.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x409160 validates QueueExitCurrentState(&g_RecoilApp, 0), then HudUiZrdWidget::OnActivate(self).
The native smoke verifies one exit-current queue item with param 0 and the expected current-state exit side effect.
